detectedProblems: global src service registration included domain types
Deptrac modeled only generic technical layers
required PostgreSQL, Intl, PostGIS and rate limiter dependencies were absent
Docker build context had no exclusion policy
API authoritative autoload was generated before application source was present
web runtime copied the complete workspace node_modules tree
base Compose exposed host ports, included Mailpit and insecure fallbacks
browser API configuration required public localhost
correlation IDs were absent from structured log context
CI lacked manual dispatch, concurrency, timeouts and final runtime checks
correctedProblems: explicit module Application, Infrastructure and UI service resources with Clock alias
module-specific Deptrac layers and a transient forbidden-dependency mutation gate
controlled Composer lock update for jsor/doctrine-postgis and Symfony RateLimiter
root .dockerignore with an executable context exclusion check
source-aware authoritative production autoload, cache warmup and non-root API runtime
pnpm deploy-based isolated web runtime without development packages or workspace dependency
safe Compose base plus isolated development, test and production overlays
internal API_BASE_URL only; no browser localhost API variable or broad CORS
UUIDv7 correlation propagation and Monolog processor with regression tests
hardened CI triggers, cancellation, timeouts, PHP 8.5 and final image runtime smoke
commands: composer update jsor/doctrine-postgis symfony/form symfony/rate-limiter symfony/security-csrf deptrac/deptrac --with-all-dependencies
docker compose config --quiet for dev, test and prod
production API, web and PostGIS runtime smoke
knownLimitations: same-origin place resource routes are added with the C2 public API contract so they can use the generated client rather than handwritten transport types
the generated API client contains an upstream generator TODO comment and is not edited manually
findingsClosed: Composer builder platform mismatch resolved without weakening final runtime extension checks
nested Git metadata excluded from Docker context
API runtime directory ownership corrected for non-root access
PHP development image gained native pgsql and zip support
container test cache warmed before PHPStan analysis
nextAction: Commit and push C1R, verify a clean worktree, then begin C2A.
